headline: Inside India newsletter: Social media is reshaping the world's fastest-growing market for global brands

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Cognizant Tech Solns, Lowers Price Target to $68
summary: Mizuho  analyst Dan Dolev   maintains Cognizant Tech Solns (NASDAQ:CTSH) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $87 to $68.

headline: Cognizant weighs up to 15,000 job cuts, most in India
summary: The planned cuts follow Project Leap, under which Cognizant expects $230m–$320m in severance costs in Q2 2026.

headline: CrowdStrike Gartner Leader Status And QuiltWorks Expansion Deepen AI Security Role
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) is named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Cyberthreat Intelligence Technologies. The company expands its Project QuiltWorks coalition, adding global partners including Armadin, Cognizant, HCLTech, Infosys, KPMG, NTT DATA, Tata Consultancy Services, and Wipro.
